zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Woodhouse于1444年出生在英国諾福爾可吉波利时，他的父亲John Woodhouse23岁，母亲Constance Gedding16岁。他和Jane Swaithing至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1480年在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可吉波利。

nameMeanings.name: Woodhouse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of various places (in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Yorkshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, and elsewhere) called Woodhouse, or a topographic name for someone who lived at a ‘house in the wood’ (Middle English wode, hous, Old English wudu, hūs).

variant of Woodiwiss , from Middle English wodewose, which by the 16th century was sometimes written as wodowes, woodose, and wodehouse. The confusion with woodhouse probably arose because both words (and both names) were pronounced /wudus/ or /wudǝs/ in local dialect.

variants.name: Woodis
meanings: perhaps a nickname from Old English wuduwāsa‘faun, satyr’.
alternatively, a shortened form of   Woodhouse  .

variants.name: Woodiwiss
meanings: English (mainly Derbyshire and Yorkshire): nickname from Middle English wodewose, wodewese (Old English wudewāse) ‘wild man of the woods’. This word was also used to denote a person dressed to represent such a being in a play or pageant. Wodewoses (male and female) were mythical creatures of English and ancient Germanic folklore, akin to the fauns and satyrs of Classical mythology. The surname may also have been acquired by someone who lived and worked in the woods or perhaps by an unusually hairy man.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Woodhouse was born in 1444, in Kimberley, Norfolk, England, his father, John Woodhouse, was 23 and his mother, Constance Gedding, was 16. He had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Jane Swaithing. He died about 1480, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Kimberley, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Woodhouse est né en 1444, à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Woodhouse, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Constance Gedding, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Jane Swaithing. Il est décédé environ 1480, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Kimberley, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Woodhouse 1444 in Kimberley, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Woodhouse 23 und seine Mutter Constance Gedding 16. Er hatte mit Jane Swaithing mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1480 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kimberley, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Woodhouse è nato il nel 1444 nel Kimberley, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John Woodhouse, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Constance Gedding, aveva 16 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Jane Swaithing. Morì circa 1480, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Kimberley, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Woodhouseが1444年にイギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーで生まれた時，父John Woodhouseは23歳，母Constance Geddingは16歳であった。彼はJane Swaithingとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1480年に故郷で37歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクキンバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Woodhouse(이)가 1444년 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Woodhouse(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Gedding(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Jane Swaithing(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1480년 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 킴벌리에 묻혔다.

mn.Kimberley, Norfolk, England, United King: Kimberley, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Woodhouse nasceu em 1444, em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Woodhouse, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Constance Gedding, tinha 16 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Jane Swaithing. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1480, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Woodhouse родился в 1444 г. в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Woodhouse было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Constance Gedding, 16. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Jane Swaithing. Он умер около 1480 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности кимбирли, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Woodhouse nació en 1444, en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Woodhouse, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Constance Gedding, tenía 16 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Jane Swaithing. Murió aproximadamente 1480, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Kimberley, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
